name: Pulsemon

signature_move.name: Elec Rush
signature_move.description: Rams into the enemy with all its might at lightning speed.

description: A Digimon that evolved under the influence of pulse waveform data stored in hospitals and gyms. It has a lively personality that treats anyone without discrimination. Pulsemon's characteristic hair is linked to its emotions, and droops whenever it feels down. It is a cunning fighter who battles by capitalizing on its natural agility, and moving around in the shape of a lightning bolt. Its Special Moves are ramming into the enemy with all its might at lightning speed ( Elec Rush ), and discharging electricity generated within its body from its hair ( Petit Impulse ). In addition, many other Digimon like Pulsemon that are influenced by the vital data of others, improving their physical abilities and evolving, have been discovered.
